caption: In a recording studio, a man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, suspenders, glasses, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He wears a distinctive grey, pointed wig on his head. The background is filled with framed photos and clothing on mannequins, including a garment with "LEE" visible on a tag. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is superimposed on the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture and facial expressions while speaking, moving his head slightly and gesturing with his hand. The background and equipment remain stationary, while the man's mouth opens and closes, indicating he is in the middle of a conversation.
